channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk drops a bomb regarding Tesla Model S, X inventory
item.description: Elon Musk just dropped a bomb regarding Tesla Model S and X inventory, and as the company is phasing out the flagship vehicles, it sounds like the time to purchase one brand new is almost over. Musk confirmed on Wednesday that there are “only a few hundred Tesla Model S & X cars left in inventory...

item.title: Tesla’s Price-to-Earnings Ratio Is Nuts
item.description: A couple of weeks ago, when I wrote about Tesla’s stock price dropping 20% in 6 months, a reader commented: “Tesla down 20% in the past 6 months and the P/E is still over 300. That is not sustainable.” Another commenter showed in more detail why this was crazy: Price ... [continued] The post Te...

item.title: TSLA stock slides, Supercharger prices, and who’s REALLY behind Elon’s big chip fab
item.description: On today’s Tesla-tastic episode of Quick Charge , a TSLA bear thinks the stock is headed for a 60% slide before the year is out, Tesla launches a Supercharger configurator, and we find out what’s really going on at Elon’s proposed chip fab. more…

item.title: Morgan Stanley delivers blunt message to Tesla stock investors
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) recent drop has investors asking the tough questions, but Morgan Stanley analyst Andrew Percoco has a clear response. The bank reiterated an equal-weight rating on the stock while keeping its $415 price target, a 17% upside from current levels. Tesla stock, though, has been ...

item.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: CrowdStrike, Avis Budget Group, Apple, Broadcom, and Tesla
item.description: Check out the companies making headlines yesterday:

item.title: Tesla Faces $43.9 Billion Free Cash Flow Swing As 2026 Outlook Turns Negative
item.description: Consensus 2026 free cash flow shifted from $38.8 billion to negative $5.1 billion, even as valuation multiples expanded and deliveries missed forecasts.

item.title: Tesla Stock Just Can’t Win. Its Iran Bump Faded.
item.description: Tesla has benefited from higher oil prices in the past, so it seemed odd that crude was down sharply and the electric-vehicle maker’s stock was up. Oil prices helped most stocks. Hopes of an end to fighting in Iran are responsible for the oil move.

item.title: Alphabet Climbs 4% on Waymo’s Nashville Expansion: The Self-Driving Bet Is Starting to Pay Off
item.description: Alphabet‘s (NASDAQ:GOOGL) stock is up 4% in Wednesday’s session, moving from $305.46 to $317 as investors cheer the latest geographic expansion of Waymo’s autonomous ride-hailing service. That gain outpaced the broader Communication Services sector, which rose 1.47% on the day, signaling that tod...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab production ignites with 60 units spotted at Giga Texas
item.description: Tesla Cybercab production at Giga Texas seems to have ignited, as 60 units were spotted outside of the production facility on Wednesday, with speculation hinting the all-electric ride-hailing vehicle could be headed to the lineup sooner rather than later. Interestingly, they were also spotted wit...

item.title: Tesla’s new Supercharger for Business tool reveals $940,000 all-in price
item.description: Tesla has quietly switched on a public configurator for its Supercharger for Business program, and the numbers tell us exactly what it now costs a third party to buy into the network: $500,000 in hardware and roughly $940,000 all-in for a standard V4 8-stall site. The tool also spits out ROI esti...

item.title: Tesla Must Reckon with a ‘Material Collapse’ in Performance Ahead of Earnings. What Will the Outcome Be for TSLA Stock?
item.description: JPMorgan has reiterated its "Underweight" rating on the EV heavyweight.

item.title: Musk falsely claims Tesla FSD is 10X safer than humans, complains about lawsuits
item.description: Elon Musk claimed this week that Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” is so much safer than human drivers that it could save 90% of the roughly one million lives lost in car crashes globally each year — a 10X improvement in safety. The problem is that Tesla has never released the data that would support a...

item.title: Intel stock soars 9% after joining Musk’s high-stakes Terafab, Wedbush flags funding risks
item.description: Intel Corp (NASDAQ:INTC, XETRA:INL) shares climbed 9.1% Wednesday after the chipmaker announced it is joining Elon Musk’s Terafab project, but analysts caution that the deal’s long-term benefits depend heavily on how the partnership is structured. Wedbush analysts said the collaboration makes...

item.title: Tesla: Time To Dump Shares
Intel Jumps 8%: The TeraFab Excitement Is Real, but Is the Valuation Stretched?
item.description: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) stock is surging 8% in Wednesday morning trading, moving from $52.91 to $57. It’s the second consecutive session of sharp gains, as the TeraFab partnership narrative pulls in buyers across retail and institutional desks. This move builds on a remarkable run.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Tesla Self-Driving Saves 'A Lot Of Lives'—Laments FSD Lawsuits: 'Will Still Get Sued For...'
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk said on Monday that the company’s Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology saves many lives as criticism over the system’s capabilities grows. Saving A Lot Of Lives In a post on the social media platform X, Musk quoted a video that purportedly showed a Tesla on FSD swerving to ...

item.title: Tesla Gains on Intel Terafab Partnership
item.description: Chip collaboration boosts sentiment despite mixed delivery outlook.

item.title: Tesla Releases 'Sentient' FSD 14.3. Stock Slashes Early Gains.
item.description: Tesla's newest version of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software came out on Tuesday night. Shares rose from a seven-month low, but lagged broad Iran ceasefire gains.

item.title: New Model Spotted - Los Angeles
item.description: Spotted a new model on the road. Looks interesting. submitted by /u/Ajrviews [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Registrations Rebound In Key Markets. Stock Still Meets Resistance.
item.description: Tesla registrations in key markets in Asia and Europe rose last month. On Wednesday, Tesla stock was down 3% for the week.

item.title: Mixed Analyst Sentiment on Tesla (TSLA) Amid Valuation Concerns
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is included in our list of the 14 hedge fund favorites with strong setup in 2026. As of April 3, 2026, despite mixed overall analyst sentiment on Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Is Tesla's Model Y L Expansion Set to Boost Sales in Asia?
item.description: TSLA expands Model Y L to eight Asian markets, betting the six-seat SUV's range, space and performance will drive strong demand and boost regional sales.

item.title: Company News for Apr 8, 2026
item.description: Companies in The News Are: AAPL,INTC,TSLA,UNH,XOM

item.title: Tesla Won't Crash Anytime Soon
Tesla (TSLA) down 20% in 2026 — JPMorgan sees another 60% downside
item.description: Tesla stock is down roughly 20% year-to-date in 2026, and JPMorgan thinks the bleeding is far from over. Analyst Ryan Brinkman reiterated his Underweight rating this week and stuck with a $145 price target — implying another ~60% downside from where TSLA trades today. The note landed days after T...

item.title: Intel Joins Musk's Terafab Targeting 1 Terawatt Annual Compute Capacity
item.description: Chipmaker partners with Tesla, SpaceX and xAI to refactor fab technology for large-scale AI, robotics and space computing output

item.title: Musk's Terafab Bet With Intel: Can it Challenge NVIDIA's AI Chip Lead?
item.description: Intel joins Musk's $25B Terafab push to build a massive AI chip hub. Could this bold move disrupt NVIDIA's dominance or face steep execution risks?

item.title: Retail investors are buying the dip in Tesla stock
item.description: The bottom fishers come out for Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Stock Soars Despite Slumping Oil Prices. Why It’s Getting an Iran Bump.
item.description: Tesla has benefited from higher oil prices in the past, so it might seem odd that crude is down sharply and the electric-vehicle maker’s stock is up. Benchmark oil prices were down more than 13% in early trading, below $95 a barrel. Hopes of an end to fighting in Iran are responsible for the moves.

item.title: Gary Black Wants Tesla To Follow Apple's Footsteps To Boost Its FSD Subscriptions
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC shared on Sunday that he hopes Tesla Inc. would follow Apple Inc.‘s marketing strategy for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system. Full Self-Driving Is The Best Autonomous System In a response to influencer Whole Mars Catalog‘s post on X, which outlined that...

item.title: Markets Roar Into an Iran Relief Rally. Why That Could Change Any Moment.
item.description: Trump, Iran agree to reopen Strait of Hormuz, the Fed’s looming leadership crisis, Intel will join Musk’s effort to create a chip factory, and more news to start your day.

item.title: NHTSA Closes Probe Into 2.5 Million Tesla Vehicles Over Self-Driving Concerns
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) announced on Monday that it would be closing an investigation into Tesla Inc.‘s “actually smart summon” self-driving feature. 2.59 Million Vehicles Could’ve Been Affected By Probe The probe could have affected over 2.59 million Tesla vehi...

item.title: Cramer: Tesla can’t trade on hopes forever
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has been one of the most debated stocks on Wall Street for years, and Jim Cramer just put the core tension into one sentence. “There’s only so long that the stock can trade on hopes about the future before we fall back to car sales.” What the Numbers Actually Show The 2025 ful...

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Amends Lawsuit Against OpenAI to Direct Potential Damages to Charity
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk Tuesday, amended his lawsuit against Microsoft (MSFT)

item.title: Intel to join Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip initiative
item.description: The manufacturing facility will be used for producing processors for AVs, robotics and space-based computing.

item.title: Tesla Stock Pulled Back 26.2% After a Monster Run. Is It Time to Buy the Dip?
item.description: Tesla's best days may still be ahead of it.

item.title: Polestar Wants Tesla Owners To Jump Ship With A Massive $21,000 Discount
item.description: The Swedish automaker’s latest discount round is even bigger than last year, when the $7,500 federal tax credit was still around.

item.title: Tesla makes major rebound in European market with 4x in registrations
item.description: Tesla headlines will have you believe the company is dead to rights in Germany, selling nearly no cars, and stating consumers are more interested in other brands not run by CEO Elon Musk. However, the latest data from Germany proves this might be a dying narrative. Tesla delivered a striking perf...

item.title: Got tired of checking 5 different sites for Tesla factory updates, so I built gigascope.xyz — satellite imagery comparison, progress tracking, and live news for all 8 factories
item.description: submitted by /u/Longjumping_Ad6946 [link] [comments]

item.title: Elon Musk reveals unfortunate truth of Tesla Full Self-Driving development
item.description: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving suite is one of the most significant technological developments in terms of passenger travel in decades, but it is not all sunshine and rainbows, even with major strides in safety, CEO Elon Musk revealed. In a candid reply to a dramatic video of Tesla’s Full Self-Driving...

item.title: SpaceX Isn’t Even Public Yet. Investors Are Already Abuzz About a Tesla Merger.
item.description: With Elon Musk focused on artificial intelligence, investors and analysts are discussing a merger of his biggest companies.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3: First Impressions
item.description: Tesla started rolling out Full Self-Driving v14.3 to Early Access Program (EAP) members earlier today, and I had the opportunity to see some of the improvements that were made from v14.2.2.5. While a lot of things got better, and I truly enjoyed using Full Self-Driving again after being stuck wit...

item.title: Tesla FSD Netherlands 2026 — RDW Approval, Pricing & What Dutch Owners Need to Know
item.description: Tesla FSD Supervised is approved in the Netherlands under RDW Extended Type Approval. Full UN-R-171 type approval confirmed for April 10, 2026. Complete guide for Dutch Tesla owners.

item.title: Analyst Says Tesla Will Deliver 1.6 Million Vehicles This Year, Says Robotaxi Scale Would Be Key Driver For TSLA
item.description: Analyst Andrew Percoco of investment bank Morgan Stanley believes Tesla Inc. deliveries could reach 1.6 million this year. 1.6 Million Deliveries, Energy Storage Miss In a new note released on Sunday, the analyst raised Tesla’s 2026 deliveries from 1.58 million to 1.6 million.

item.title: Intel Terafab Alliance With Musk Companies Puts Foundry Turnaround To Test
item.description: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) is partnering with Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI on the Terafab semiconductor project. The alliance targets manufacturing capacity for one terawatt per year of AI and robotics compute power. The deal centers on Intel’s foundry, AI chip manufacturing, and advanced packaging capabili...

item.title: Tesla Q1 2026 Deliveries Strengthen The Bearish Outlook
Wall Street Sees 22% Upside for Tesla (TSLA) This Year
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is currently trading around $340.27, while the average Wall Street analyst price target sits at $416.15. That implies Tesla has roughly 22% upside today. Tesla’s 21.55% year-to-date decline has reset the stock to levels that force a genuine question: Is Wall Street seeing some...

item.title: Intel Joins Musk's Terafab, Shares Rise on Partnership News
item.description: Chipmaker partners with SpaceX, and Tesla, on a 1-terawatt AI chip complex in Austin

item.title: Intel Stock Rises After Joining Musk's Terafab Project
item.description: Intel Stock Rises After Joining Musk's Terafab Project

item.title: Tesla’s Cumulative Vehicle Sales Surpass 9 Million — And It Becomes #1 BEV Seller Again
item.description: Tesla’s vehicle sales have declined in recent years, and are basically stagnant in a good quarter these days. However, it is still one of the top EV sellers in the world. Actually, news is that it took back the title of #1 from BYD in the first quarter of 2026 ...
